Think of 4 states: first buy, first sell, second buy, second sell.
For each day, update each state greedily. buy1 = max(buy1, -price), sell1 = max(sell1, buy1 + price).
The second buy uses profit from first sell: buy2 = max(buy2, sell1 - price).
sell2 = max(sell2, buy2 + price). The answer is sell2.
